modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: USB devices not functioning with Thinkpad OneLink+ Dock

full_description_text:  
I connected my HP laptop to the Thinkpad OneLink+ Dock, but now my USB devices won't work. My USB printer just stopped responding when I tried to print. It's really frustrating because I need to get my work done.
short_description: USB devices not functioning with Thinkpad OneLink+ Dock
description: I connected my HP laptop to the Thinkpad OneLink+ Dock, but now my USB devices won't work. My USB printer just stopped responding when I tried to print. It's really frustrating because I need to get my work done.
